name: Children's Allergy and Asthma Data Repository
description: The Children’s Allergy and Asthma Data Repository (CADRE) is a centralized resource created to address a critical gap in asthma research: identifying the risk factors and biological mechanisms that lead to childhood asthma. By uniting data from various cohorts, CADRE empowers researchers to uncover insights that individual studies alone cannot provide. Birth cohort studies have…

creator.name: Board of Regents of the University of Wisconsin System

distribution.name: CADRE Core Data Elements Spreadsheet
distribution.description: Downloadable spreadsheet listing the 200 harmonized core data elements used most frequently in CREW and CADRE publications.

distribution.name: CADRE Ancillary Data Elements Spreadsheet
distribution.description: Downloadable spreadsheet listing additional harmonized ancillary data elements.

recordSet.name: Core Data Elements
recordSet.description: Each record describes a core data element (variable) available in the CADRE repository, including its description, category, and response options.

field.name: Data element
field.description: Unique identifier for the data element.

field.name: Response Options
field.description: Possible response options for the data element.

recordSet.name: Ancillary Data Elements
recordSet.description: Each record describes an ancillary data element (variable) available in the CADRE repository, including its description, category, and response options.

field.name: Data element
field.description: Unique identifier for the data element.

field.name: Response Options
field.description: Possible response options for the data element.
